text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: To be honest, the last loss really ticked me off.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I asked myself, could all my hard work and
training really just amount to that?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I don't want to have that feeling ever again.
choice_data_list: Let's show everyone what you're capable of!
Let's show everyone what you're capable of!
